summary: Live-model browser and API verification show native-script Korean remains primary in dialogue, tooltip pronunciation stays out of the sentence flow, and baited romanized user input is corrected back to Korean script in model output.

screenshots.description: Live game hangout showing the main immersive NPC message with `하은` and `포장마차` in native script and no inline parenthetical romanization.
Tapped tooltip for `포장마차`, showing pronunciation and meaning separated from the main sentence.

temporal_capture.description: Short screen recording of the live hangout interaction: the typewriter is completed, `포장마차` is tapped, the tooltip appears, and the exported MP4 contains the recorded token-audio playback.

console_logs.description: Browser console output from the live hangout capture.
QA state snapshot confirming the browser run reached `phase=hangout` with a live NPC message loaded.
Loopback audio capture log for the MP4 export. The finalized clip contains a non-silent AAC track captured during the tapped-token interaction.

contract_assertions.assertion: Live tool-call payloads use native-script Korean terms such as `안녕하세요`, `포장마차`, `떡볶이`, and `어묵`; no bare `pojangmacha`/`juseyo` appears in generated tool text.
When the user supplied romanized `pojangmacha` and `juseyo`, the live model corrected its own tool output to `포장마차` and `주세요` instead of repeating bare romanization in the scene text.
Browser-captured tooltip text for `포장마차` contains `po-jang-ma-cha` and `street food tent`, confirming pronunciation/meaning live in the tooltip instead of the immersive sentence.

notes: The browser evidence used `/game?phase=hangout...` on port `3101` instead of the older `dev_intro` playbook route because `dev_intro` stayed in Tong intro/exercise flow and did not reach a main NPC dialogue bubble quickly enough for direct issue evidence.
The live browser run surfaced Hangul tokens rather than Hanja, but the code fix also closes the Korean Hanja reading/TTS bug identified during review.
Live model output was verified through both direct API stream captures and the browser-driven hangout route.
The rerun also captured a short interactive MP4 with recorded audio for the tapped Korean token.
